§3.1 三角函數導數影片 — 全片密度稽核

2026-06-29 · 19 個內容場 · 三方對照（講義 ↔ storyboard ↔ render 最滿幀）· 六族 fan-out ＋ 對抗式複驗（7 agents）· 唯讀，未改任何 LOCKED 內容

稽核問的是「有沒有承載性缺口（學生會不會跟不上）」——答案是沒有。但這 ≠ 回答了「教學效果好不好」。

19
內容場
18
維持
1
提議改動（advisory）
0
複驗存活的改動
7/19
fill = low
結論一（稽核能保證的）：proof 與場景都「忠實且跟得上」。 沒有任何一場有承載性數學憑空出現——被省的步驟要嘛在相鄰場景已交代、要嘛是機械性先備恆等式（如 sum-to-product）、要嘛旁白同步唸出。唯一被標的 continuity_of_sin_cos 也只是 advisory，且對抗式複驗判定為 over-report（旁白已說明界的來源）。
結論二（稽核同時證實了你的觀察）：場景確實稀、版面確實空。 fill_ratio 逐場記錄如下——proof 四場全是 low（~30-35%），稽核自己的字眼是「clearly room to show more」「whitespace to spare」「empty bottom third」。所以「稀」是事實；爭點只在「稀 ≠ 壞」。而「明明有半個畫面空著卻只放三行骨架，對影片教學是不是最優」——這是設計取捨，稽核框架刻意劃為非 finding，並沒有真正回答它。
theorem_proof（4 場）continuity / fundamental_limit / sin' / cos'全部 low (~30-35%)
definition_math（3 場）why_trig / derivative_cycle / toward_chain_rule全部 low
derivation（5 場）diff_quotient / squeeze / companion / six / shm_computemedium (~45-65%)
graph + hook（4 場）sector / squeeze_graph / slope=height / shm_stackedmedium
callout（2 場）limit≠identity / radiansmedium（卡身飽滿，左側 navy-spine 留白為模板慣例）
recap（1 場）Key Takeawaysmedium（右下象限留白）

我的建議（待你裁決的取捨）

這不是「修 bug」，是兩種教學哲學之間的選擇：
  • A. 維持極簡骨架（現況）：忠實、乾淨、讓 keystone 公式呼吸，代數交給旁白。風險＝畫面留白、雙重編碼（看＋聽）的好處沒吃到。
  • B. 針對 proof 族做「視覺補強」：用已有的留白，把 1–2 行真正承載的中間式擺上畫面，讓畫面「顯示」、旁白「解釋」。風險＝若補過頭會變數學牆。
我傾向 B 但要外科手術式、只挑刀口——最值得補的是 continuity_of_sin_cos（把產生界 \(|\cos x-\cos x_0|\le 2|\sin\tfrac{x-x_0}{2}|\) 的 sum-to-product 恆等式擺上畫面，這是全片唯一畫面邏輯真的會「跳」的地方）；其次幾個 theorem 場可補一行 \(\lim_{h\to0}\) 的 setup framing。fundamental_limit、derivative_of_sine/cosine 證明本來就短，不建議硬塞，否則流於做作。derivation 與 graph 族維持。

逐場對照（含實際 render 幀）

why_trig_is_different definition_math

維持 KEEPadvisoryfaithfulfill: low ~30-40%

Motivation scene: handout opening prose (sec-3-1.html lines 56-62) funnels the sin difference quotient down to lim sinθ/θ (0/0). The frame shows exactly the two load-bearing objects the prose introduces — the difference quotient (sin(x+h)-sin x)/h and lim_{θ→0} sinθ/θ with the (0/0) tag. The actual sum-to-product reduction is deferred to the next scene (difference_quotient_for_sine, a derivation template outside this family), so nothing load-bearing is hidden here. No gap. Frame fill is ~35-40%: content sits in the upper-left, with the entire bottom third and right ~40% empty. Whitespace is generous but this is a setup card with one teaching idea; not a teaching deficiency, hence advisory not blocking.

difference_quotient_for_sine derivation

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Handout lines 66-72 give exactly three load-bearing lines: sum-to-product numerator, divide-by-h to cos(x+h/2)·sin(h/2)/(h/2), and the limit form cos x·lim sinθ/θ. The frame shows all three (steps.0, steps.1, result) verbatim with their reasons (sum-to-product / write h=2·h/2 / continuity+the limit). No source step is hidden; the only thing narrated-not-shown (the per-factor limit reasoning) is mechanical and reappears in derivative_of_sine. Fill ~50%: three rows with large vertical gaps and an empty bottom third, so there is whitespace to spare, but nothing missing — advisory at most, so keep.

sector_inequality graph(hook)

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Figure 3.1 caption requires the nesting triangle OAB sits inside sector OAB inside triangle OAC, plus the three areas and the chain 1/2 sinθ ≤ 1/2 θ ≤ 1/2 tanθ. The frame shows all three nested regions distinctly (inner triangle, orange sector wedge, outer triangle up to C=(1,tanθ)), points O/A/B/C, the angle θ, all three area labels (1/2 sinθ, 1/2 θ, 1/2 tanθ), and the inequality printed below. The teaching point of the figure is fully on screen; nothing load-bearing is hidden. Diagram is center-weighted with empty left third and lower margin, but a graph/hook scene is judged on whether the picture carries the caption, which it does.

squeeze_to_the_bound derivation

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Handout lines 94-96 chain: multiply areas by 2 → sinθ≤θ≤tanθ; ÷sinθ with tan=sin/cos → 1≤θ/sinθ≤1/cosθ; reciprocate (reverses) → cosθ≤sinθ/θ≤1 on (0,π/2); plus the kept bound 0≤|sinθ|≤|θ|. The frame shows all four rows with matching reason chips. Every inequality on screen has a visible source row above it — no bound appears from nowhere. Fill ~55%, four well-spaced rows; room remains but the argument is complete. Keep.

continuity_of_sin_cos theorem_proof

補回承載步驟advisorygapfill: low ~30-40%

Frame shows proof.1 as |cos x − cos x₀| ≤ 2|sin((x−x₀)/2)| → 0 with no on-screen source. In the handout this bound is derived from the sum-to-product identity for cos x − cos x₀ plus |sin((x+x₀)/2)| ≤ 1; on the frame the factor 2|sin((x−x₀)/2)| appears 憑空. This is exactly the auditor's named gap case. The right half and lower third of the 16:9 frame are empty (fill ~35%), so an intermediate identity line fits without crowding. Marked advisory not blocking: the bound is still the same machinery as the |sinθ|≤|θ| step shown above and the narration states it, but seeing the identity would let a learner follow where the 2 and the half-angle come from.

畫面上沒有、講義有的：
  • The sum-to-product identity cos x − cos x₀ = −2 sin((x−x₀)/2) sin((x+x₀)/2) together with |sin((x+x₀)/2)| ≤ 1, which is the visible source of the bound |cos x − cos x₀| ≤ 2|sin((x−x₀)/2)| (handout lines 116-121)
複驗：反駁（判定 over-report，不需改）

反駁（over-report）。finding 自身的判準是「某步在螢幕與旁白都沒有來源」，但此處旁白已承載來源：proof.1 出現時 say 明說「the sum-to-product identities bound both changes by at most 2|sin((x−x₀)/2)|, which goes to zero as x→x₀」（storyboard 195-196 行）。觀眾在該幀出現的同一時刻就被告知這個 2|sin((x−x₀)/2)| 界是「由和差化積恆等式」而來——正是看到那個 2 與半角從何而來所需的指引。和差化積本身是記憶型先備恆等式、機械而標準，不是這個證明的核心想法（核心是「界住差、再夾擠」）；把整段恆等式（cos、sin 兩行 aligned ＋ |·|≤1 註）搬上幀，會把刻意壓縮的三點證明骨架變擁擠，且讓死記的機械步驟喧賓奪主。完整代數推導留在講義（權威參照，116-121 行）即可。缺口只相對於教科書的完整嚴謹度才存在，對影片觀眾而言旁白已使其可跟上，故缺口不承載。

fundamental_limit theorem_proof

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: low ~30-40%

Frame carries statement lim sinθ/θ = 1, then proof.0 cos θ ≤ sinθ/θ ≤ 1 (0<θ<π/2), proof.1 cos θ → 1 ⇒ sinθ/θ → 1, qed even ⇒ two-sided = 1 — the full handout proof (line 141). The bound cos θ ≤ sinθ/θ ≤ 1 is inequality (1) established in the prior squeeze_to_the_bound scene, so within this proof it is a faithful recap of a secured result, not a hidden derivation. The 'cos θ → 1 by continuity' step legitimately leans on the immediately-preceding continuity proposition. No load-bearing step is concealed. Fill is low (~35%) with large right/bottom whitespace, but the argument is complete and short by nature, so 維持.

squeeze_graph graph(stock)

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Figure 3.2 caption asks for sinθ/θ trapped between cosθ (dashed, below) and the constant 1 (above), both bounds tending to 1, with an open circle at θ=0. Frame shows the cosθ floor, the line at height 1, the orange sinθ/θ curve nestled in the narrowing gap, the hollow circle at (0,1), and the annotation 'Trapped between cosθ and 1, the ratio is forced to 1 — undefined at θ=0.' This is a stock graph that fully conveys the squeeze; the algebraic bound (1) lives in the adjacent squeeze_to_the_bound derivation scene, not here. Faithful.

limit_not_identity callout

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Callout/caution scene — by design it should be light. The on-screen body reproduces the handout caution verbatim in substance: it states this is the limit as θ→0 and not an identity, and shows the load-bearing concrete values (at θ=π/2 the ratio is 2/π≈0.64, at θ=π it is 0). Handout source (sec-3-1.html lines 150-156) carries the same two evaluations; nothing reasoning-bearing is spoken-only. Card text runs from the CAUTION masthead down to near the card's bottom edge, so the card itself is well filled (medium overall frame fill due to the intentional empty left navy-spine band, which is template convention, not a content gap).

radians_essential callout

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Callout/caution scene; correctly light. The frame shows the full structural point: in degrees lim_{x→0} sin(x°)/x = π/180, hence d/dx sin(x°) = (π/180)cos(x°), and the clean sin'=cos holds only in radians — matching the handout caution (sec-3-1.html lines 158-164). The decisive π/180 factor and the degree-derivative formula are both rendered on screen, not merely narrated, so no learner-essential step is hidden. Card body fills from masthead to lower portion of the card; empty left band is the navy-spine template masthead, not whitespace to be backfilled.

derivative_of_sine theorem_proof

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: low ~30-40%

Frame shows d/dx sin x = cos x, then proof.0 cos(x+h/2)·sin(h/2)/(h/2), proof.1 the two limit facts (cos(x+h/2)→cos x, sin(h/2)/(h/2)→1), qed ⇒ cos x·1 = cos x — matching handout lines 182-186. The difference-quotient form is not invented here: it was derived in scene difference_quotient_for_sine, and the two limit facts cite the continuity and fundamental-limit propositions just proved. Nothing load-bearing appears 憑空. Whitespace is heavy (fill ~30%) but the handout proof itself is this short and mechanical, so 維持.

derivative_of_cosine theorem_proof

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: low ~30-40%

Parallel to derivative_of_sine. Frame shows d/dx cos x = −sin x, then proof.0 −sin(x+h/2)·sin(h/2)/(h/2), proof.1 the two limit facts, qed ⇒ −sin x — matching handout lines 203-206. The handout opens this proof with the companion identity cos A − cos B = −2 sin((A+B)/2) sin((A−B)/2); the frame omits that identity line, but the narration calls it out and the resulting quotient form −sin(x+h/2)·sin(h/2)/(h/2) is the structural mirror of the sine case the learner just saw two scenes prior — so the omitted identity is the 機械性/parallel kind, a fair compression rather than a concealed bound. Faithful; low fill (~30%) but the proof is short by nature. 維持.

slope_equals_height graph(hook)

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Figure 3.3 caption: tangents to y=sin x at x=0, π/2, π have slopes 1, 0, -1, exactly the heights of y=cos x there. Frame shows y=sin x (orange) and y=cos x (muted dashed), three tangent segments labeled m=1, m=0, m=-1, and the cosine height dots at 1, 0, -1. The slope-equals-height correspondence is fully drawn and labeled — the teaching point is on screen. No load-bearing step hidden; the proof of sin'=cos is in the separate derivative_of_sine theorem_proof scene.

derivative_cycle definition_math

維持 KEEPadvisoryfaithfulfill: low ~30-40%

Remark 3.1 (sec-3-1.html lines 289-296). The two math objects that carry the idea — the cycle sin x→cos x→−sin x→−cos x→sin x and d⁴/dx⁴ sin x = sin x — are both on screen. The handout's extra prose (e^x reproduces in one step vs. four; tie to s''=−s) is narrated enrichment, not a step a learner must SEE to follow the cycle. No hidden load-bearing step → faithful, 維持. Fill ~low: chain + d⁴ equation occupy the left-center band; bottom ~40% and right ~45% are empty. Empty space could host a small visual but content is complete; advisory.

companion_limit derivation

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Example 3.1 (handout lines 227-234): multiply by 1+cosθ to get (1-cos²θ)/(θ(1+cosθ)); rewrite 1-cos²θ=sin²θ and split into (sinθ/θ)·(sinθ/(1+cosθ)); take limit 1·0/(1+1)=0. The frame shows all three algebraic rows with the identities annotated. The 0/0-resolving trick and the factor split are both visible, so the learner sees why each factor's limit is what it is. Fill ~50% with the usual large gaps; complete, keep.

all_six_trig_derivatives derivation

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Example 3.2 (handout lines 250-260): tan' via quotient rule on sin/cos, collapse cos²+sin²=1 to sec²x, sec'=sec x tan x, and the cot'/csc' results. The frame shows the quotient-rule numerator, the Pythagorean collapse to sec²x, sec', and the remaining cot'/csc' line. This is the densest frame of the family (~65%), tighter row spacing. The sec' derivation itself is compressed to its result (handout shows the 0·cos−1·(−sin) step) but that is a mechanical quotient-rule application the viewer just watched on tan', so its omission is fair compression, not a load-bearing gap. Keep.

shm_compute derivation

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Example 3.3 (handout lines 276-278): s=sin t, s'=cos t, s''=-sin t, and the punchline s''=-sin t=-s(t) marking simple harmonic motion. The frame shows all four lines with labels height/velocity/acceleration/SHM. The chain is mechanical (just applying Thm 3.1/3.2 twice) and every step is on screen. Fill ~45%: four short equations with very large vertical gaps and an empty bottom — clearly room to show more, but the math is complete and nothing is hidden, so advisory whitespace only. Keep.

shm_stacked_graphs graph(hook)

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Figure 3.4 caption: three stacked graphs over one time axis — s=sin t (top), s'=cos t (middle), s''=-sin t (bottom) — with dashed verticals at the peak/trough and the bottom graph as the top flipped, i.e. s''=-s. Frame shows all three labeled curves, two dashed vertical reference lines, and the s''=-s label at the bottom. The mirror relationship (bottom = top inverted) is visible, conveying the figure's point. The algebraic chain s→s'→s'' is in the shm_compute derivation scene; this hook only needs to draw the relationship, which it does. Faithful.

toward_the_chain_rule definition_math

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: low ~30-40%

Forward-reference scene (sec-3-1.html closing prose, line 299). Per the audit rule, forward-refs are meant to be light; faithfulness is the bar and it is met — the statement (can do sin x, not yet sin(x²) or sin(3x+1)) and the sin x ✓ / sin(x²)? / sin(3x+1)? math line both render, matching the handout's bare-vs-composed contrast. No argument is being made here, so no load-bearing step can be missing. Fill is low (lower ~half of the frame empty) but that is expected for a teaser card; not a finding.

recap recap_cards

維持 KEEPnonefaithfulfill: medium ~45-65%

Recap 模板本就該輕，職責是綜合整節而非重證。對照講義 SS3.1，四根支柱全部可見：① 基本極限 sinθ/θ→1＋單位圓擠壓；② sin'=cos、cos'=-sin；③ 商法則導出其餘三角導數（講義 Example/quotient rule §2.5）；④ 四步導數循環（Remark 3.1）＋radians 必要性（講義 line 62、158 caution）。兩個 keystone 公式（極限與兩導數）另置於 REMEMBER 卡。沒有任何承載性步驟被藏起——recap 不需顯示擠壓或 sum-to-product 推導，那些在前面的 proof 場已交代。fill 為 medium：左欄四點飽滿，但右下象限明顯留白（兩張公式卡擠在右上），尚有空間，惟內容已忠實完整，留白屬 recap 性質可接受，故僅維持、不報缺口。

方法與限制

本稽核唯讀，對照三方來源：講義 handout/fragments/ch03/sec-3-1.html、storyboard video/storyboards/ch03_trig_derivatives.yml、render 最滿幀 video/output/_qa/ch03-frames/…。判準刻意嚴格（refute-by-default、只認「畫面與旁白皆無來源」的承載性缺口），以免 over-report——這也是為何它對「留白是否該填」保守。intro／4 個 divider／outro 為純動畫，不在密度評估範圍。
